pr-evidence/release-evidence-probe-actio.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no findings, approved the release-evidence pair checks, and ran PYTHONPATH=src pytest -q with 846 passing tests.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Tightened strict V1 release evidence cross-checks between native engine probe and connector-action sidecars
Added payload-mode and exact-layout mismatch tests for probe/action pairs
pr-evidence/release-evidence-probe-actio.why: Ensure vLLM/SGLang connector-action artifacts audited in a release describe the same payload shape and KV layout as the native block-manager probe result.
